mainEntity.name: What if third party caused my work slip in Holladay Utah?
mainEntity.text: What if third party caused my work slip in Holladay Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: File workers' comp then subrogate or sue third party separately for additional damages beyond comp limits.[5]

suggestedAnswer.text: Employer insurer pays comp then pursues at-fault vendor. Employee sues directly for negligence pain damages. Common in construction sites. Attorney coordinates dual claims avoiding offsets. Higher totals possible.[5]

name: Third Party Liability in Holladay Work Slips
description: File workers' comp then subrogate or sue third party separately for additional damages beyond comp limits.[5]
